name: android16-clean-edition
description: Minimalistyczny launcher Android 16 Clean Edition (HTML/CSS/JS + WebView, OOBE, intents).

scripts.build: rm -rf dist && mkdir -p dist/vendor && cp web/index.html dist/index.html && cp web/styles.css dist/styles.css && cp web/app.js dist/app.js && cp node_modules/@capacitor/core/dist/capacitor.js dist/vendor/capacitor.js
